Added_Other.name: DFIntGetMeshPartJointOffsetTelemetryThrottle
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the frequency of telemetry data for mesh part joints.
Added_Other.purpose: Reduces server load while maintaining necessary data collection.

Added_Other.name: FFlagAXMISRemoveSingleItemPurchaseFromTryOn
Added_Other.mechanism: Removes the option to try on single items before purchasing.
Added_Other.purpose: Streamlines the shopping experience by focusing on full outfits instead of individual items.

Added_Network.name: FFlagDelayAudioFocusReplication
Added_Network.mechanism: Introduces a delay in how audio focus changes are communicated.
Added_Network.purpose: Improves audio experience by reducing abrupt changes in sound.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a dynamic string for the Git hash in the repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players have the latest updates and features.

Removed_Other.purpose: Simplifies the purchasing process for players, focusing on bulk item purchases instead.

Removed_Network.name: FFlagDelayAudioFocusReplication_Staged
Removed_Network.mechanism: Adjusts how audio focus changes are sent to players.
Removed_Network.purpose: Ensures smoother audio transitions when multiple sounds are playing.

Added_Other.mechanism: Detects and manages header blocks in game data.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother gameplay by preventing issues caused by corrupted data.

Added_Other.name: FFlagLoadRawBytecodeWithHashKey
Added_Other.mechanism: Enables loading of raw bytecode using a hash key for verification.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves security and performance when loading game scripts.

Added_Other.mechanism: Removes complex mesh operations from simulation parts.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance and stability in games using simulation parts.
